name: borrower-name-legal-vs-preferred
rationale: loan_application doc shows borrower_name legal: 'Marcus Anthony Webb'. Broker uses preferred name in email + correction: 'Marcus Webb' (drops middle name). F1.BN canonical-map encounters legal vs preferred name divergence. Layer 3 product-design: which is authoritative for canonical_map? Legal (matches title/payout docs) or preferred (matches broker-facing comms)? Possibilities: (a) legal always, (b) preferred for comms + legal for legal docs (two-field model), (c) broker_correction always wins.
